BytesArrayTooLong().notice: Thrown when converting a bytes array to a uint256 and the bytes array is too long.

EmptyInitcode().notice: Thrown when parsing a blueprint preamble and the resulting initcode is empty.

FfiFailed(string).notice: Error for when an ffi command fails.

IdentityPrecompileCallFailed().notice: Thrown when call to the identity precompile fails.

NotABlueprint().notice: Thrown when parsing a blueprint preamble and the bytecode does not contain the expected prefix bytes.

ReservedBitsSet().notice: Thrown when parsing a blueprint preamble and the reserved bits are set.

userdoc.notice: Script used to deploy a bedrock system. The entire system is deployed within the `run` function.         To add a new contract to the system, add a public function that deploys that individual contract.         Then add a call to that function inside of `run`. Be sure to call the `save` function after each         deployment so that hardhat-deploy style artifacts can be generated using a call to `sync()`.         This contract must not have constructor logic because it is set into state using `etch`.

params._name: The name of the proxy contract to be deployed.
params._proxyOwner: The address of the owner of the proxy contract.

returns.addr_: The address of the deployed proxy contract.

params._protocolVersionsProxy: Address of the existing ProtocolVersions proxy
params._superchainConfigProxy: Address of the existing SuperchainConfig proxy
